creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
Created attachment 155549
svn diff for misc/firestring

This is a proposal to the CURRENTLY listed MAINTAINER;

I recently received a notice that dns/firedns was listed
as BROKEN, because it's source had gone missing. As I
use firedns, I offered, and now host the source. But
because firedns also depends on this port, and because
this ports source also went missing. I'd like to request
MAINTAINER'ship for this port. I mean no disrespect.
We all get it, Life Happens. :-)
The attached snv diff provides/changes the following:

MASTER_SITES
MAINTAINER
WWW

I've added myself, as source mirror, changed WWW,
because the one currently listed has no reference to
this port/application. Changes MAINTAINER to me.

Thank you for all your time, and consideration.

--Chris
